summary: Rust Tauri host commands and desktop capabilities for backend auth requests, deep links, opener allowlists, and native window behavior.
responsibilities: Validate desktop auth values before sending API requests.
Apply bounded HTTP client timeouts to desktop auth exchange, validation, revoke, and backend health requests.
Register the diffforge deep-link scheme on desktop platforms.
Restrict opener permissions to approved Diff Forge AI web destinations used by the desktop auth and billing gate.
